text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "reg.exe is used to establish a persistence mechanism by setting 'UserInitMprLogonScript' in HKCU\\Environment to execute a batch file from the user's temporary directory at logon. This is a common technique for malware.",
  "indicators": [
    "reg.exe",
    "HKCU\\Environment",
    "UserInitMprLogonScript",
    "AppData\\Local\\Temp",
    "persistence"
  ]
}
